headline: Is It Time To Reconsider PayPal (PYPL) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: This article examines whether PayPal Holdings is beginning to look like a value opportunity or whether its price still needs to adjust, by focusing on what investors are actually paying for the business. The stock closed at US$51.22, with returns of 3.3% over 7 days and 12.6% over 30 days, compared with a year-to-date return of an 11.9% decline and a 1-year return of a 17.6% decline. Recent headlines have focused on PayPal Holdings' role in digital payments and how it is responding to...
